name: scholarly-research-book
description: Agent Skills plugin for rigorous research nonfiction and research book writing: accessibility support, dictation notes, reading-load triage, prose repair, research intent routing, source discovery, source notes, extraction tables, literature review, argument architecture, chapters, claim traceability, citations, release audits, and proposal support.

interface.shortDescription: Accessibility support, research routing, source, argument, citation, figure/table, integrity, release, and proposal workflows for scholarly nonfiction.
interface.longDescription: A local plugin with focused Agent Skills for planning, researching, drafting, auditing, and revising scholarly nonfiction or a research book. Includes accessibility support for rough notes, dictation, reading load, and meaning-preserving prose repair, lightweight research-intent routing, staged architecture docs, a mode registry, book artifact contracts, source discovery, source notes, extraction tables, literature review mapping, claim-evidence ledgers, claim traceability, counterargument review, citation integrity checks, figure/table integrity checks, scholarly integrity gates, AI/human workflow logs, release audits, comp verification, and book proposal support.
defaultPrompt: Use research-intent-router to classify this research request, choose the smallest useful skill route, and decide whether deep source lookup is needed.
Use dyslexia-research-companion to route a mixed or unclear accessibility bottleneck and choose the smallest low-load first step.
Use dictation-to-research-notes to turn this voice transcript into claims, evidence needs, ambiguities, and next actions.
Use reading-load-reducer to triage dense material into read closely, skim, park, or skip.
Use dyslexia-friendly-prose-editor to repair spelling, grammar, and sentence boundaries without changing meaning.
Use research-intent-router in deep mode to route this research request and attempt source lookup with verification limits.
Use Research Book Skills to turn my book idea into a staged research and writing plan.
Use annotation-to-source-note to turn my highlights into source-bound notes with locator gaps marked.
Use extraction-table-builder to build a source matrix before synthesis.
Use rights-privacy-release-auditor to check this packet before external sharing.
Use figure-table-integrity-auditor to audit figures, tables, captions, axes, data provenance, and duplicate visual risk.
Use scholarly-integrity-gate to check AI-assisted research workflows for hallucinated evidence, methodology fabrication, shortcut reliance, frame-lock, and human checkpoint gaps.
Use ai-human-workflow-log to record tool use, affected sections, human decisions, override reasons, and AI-use disclosure notes.
Audit this chapter with the claim-evidence ledger and citation-integrity auditor.
Map this literature into schools of thought, debates, gaps, and a chapter strategy.
Create JSON book artifacts that follow the book artifact contract.
